DP.131.0000:
Everyone calls me the Pokémon
Move Maniac. I prefer Move Tutor.\f
I know every move that Pokémon learn
while they’re leveling up, and I can\r
teach Pokémon those moves.\f
I can teach a move to a Pokémon
of yours if you’d like.\f
I’ll do it if you’ll trade me
a Heart Scale.\f
DP.131.0001:
Oh! That’s it! That’s an honest-to-
goodness Heart Scale!\f
Let me guess, you want me to teach
one of your Pokémon a move?\f
DP.131.0002:
If any of your Pokémon needs to learn a
move, come back with a Heart Scale.
DP.131.0005:
Sorry...\f
There isn’t any move I can teach
that Pokémon.
DP.131.0006:
Hunh?\f
Don’t you think it’d be tough for
an Egg to learn a move?
